name: FDS: MCP Lookup Tool - Aluminum Fence

nodes.name: When Executed from MCP Trigger Call

parameters.name: sql
parameters.value: WITH filtered AS (SELECT sku, family_code, unit_name, name, price, box_qty, post_thickness, true_gate_width_in, style, bottom_type, width_in, vendor_sku, height_in, note, rail_type FROM Products_summary_active_description_family_code_name_price_sku_unit_code WHERE family_code = 2 AND style = "Concord" AND active = true AND height_in = 48) SELECT *, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM filtered) AS total_count FROM filtered ORDER BY price DESC, unit_name, style, height_in, width_in LIMIT 5
